title: Bridge Essay: Decoding the contents and strength of imagery before volitional engagement.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal Reconstruction** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mental imagery — visual imagery as real perception, imagination, pareidolia, aphantasia.

**Decoding the contents and strength of imagery before volitional engagement.**. Sci Rep.. PMID: 30837493. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-019-39813-y. Is it possible to predict the freely chosen content of voluntary imagery from prior neural signals? Here we show that the content and strength of future voluntary imagery can be decoded from activity patterns in visual and frontal areas well before participants engage in voluntary imagery. Participants freely chose which of two images to imagine.
